key_insights.insight: Front-loading pain by taking the worst jobs when young yields long-term gains, as demonstrated by Navy SEALs who endure hardship to reap benefits later.
key_insights.quote: You do all the worst things when you're young. But then for the rest of your life, you're a fucking former Navy SEAL. You're set because he front-loaded the pain.

key_insights.insight: Economic interconnectedness shows that having even minimal interactions with wealthy individuals can significantly increase a person's future wealth due to the contagious nature of ideas and vision.
key_insights.quote: If this neighborhood just has a few rich people in it…If you go 30 years down the line, the kids that just had a few more interactions with rich people are going to be richer on average by 35%.

key_insights.insight: If you believe that money is evil, you're not going to make much of it, so it's best to think of money as a tool.
key_insights.quote: You're never going to attract it if you don't like it. If you think it's evil, you're certainly not going to make much of it.

key_insights.insight: One of the most valuable things you can learn is to negotiate deals, with the book Main Street Millionaire being a recommended resource to start.
key_insights.quote: You're never going to regret learning how to do deals…I think that is the most valuable skill set in the world.

key_insights.insight: Be obsessed, not just interested, in the things you want to achieve to become more knowledgeable.
key_insights.quote: If you can find people who are obsessed with the thing that you're doing, it just means they don't work hard. They're just like, they think of it as hardly working because they're so intense on it and they can't help themselves.

key_insights.insight: The current market landscape presents generational wealth creation opportunities because baby boomers who own more than 50% of small businesses and are reaching retirement often lack transition plans.
key_insights.quote: Baby boomers right now are retiring across this country in levels that we have never seen. This is a generational wealth creation event, really across the world.

key_insights.insight: Buying 'boring' or 'gateway drug' businesses like laundromats or car washes provide a low-risk way to learn business principles and gain experience.
key_insights.quote: Gateway drug business is a business that is so simple that you can explain it to your grandmother and also you can probably run it even if you've never run a business before.

key_insights.insight: For a business to be successful, it must have these 'Three R's': Referrals, Reviews and Retention.
key_insights.quote: If your business doesn't have the three R's, you will spend your life marketing, and marketing is actually quite hard and expensive.

key_insights.insight: Rather than allowing perceived prejudices and perceived differences to be a crutch, flip your mindset.
key_insights.quote: What if the thing that you think is your biggest weakness and the thing that makes you feel excluded and less than is actually your biggest strength?

actionable_advice.advice: Leverage the 'unfair advantage Venn diagram' to determine the best business to start or buy.
actionable_advice.how_to: Identify your skillset, network connections, and personal interests to find a business that aligns with all three.

actionable_advice.advice: Apply the '10X rule' in networking and mentorships.
actionable_advice.how_to: Provide 10 times the value to a person before asking for anything. Follow up on advice given and report on the positive impact it had, without expecting a response.

actionable_advice.advice: Focus on learning rather than earning in your 20s.
actionable_advice.how_to: Prioritize opportunities that expand your knowledge and skills, even if they offer lower initial pay.  View your salary as payment for the education you're receiving.

actionable_advice.advice: When interviewing, show that you've researched the company thoroughly.
actionable_advice.how_to: Demonstrate your understanding of the company's operations, challenges, and strategic decisions. Ask insightful questions that show you've done your homework.

actionable_advice.advice: Implement a '24-hour rule' to increase speed and efficiency.
actionable_advice.how_to: Strive to make decisions and take action within 24 hours of identifying a task or problem. Iterate quickly based on feedback and results.

actionable_advice.advice: If you want a higher salary, structure a deal.
actionable_advice.how_to: Offer a percentage of the upside that I drive above and beyond a target number.

memorable_stories: Cody's story about Bruce, the Goldman Sachs executive who bought an ambassadorship, illustrating the power of money.
Cody's story about her early career challenges, initially feeling that she was being disadvantaged by being a woman.
contrarian_claims: That being in your 20's 'sucks' despite the common narrative about them being amazing.
That a large number of younger people are showing a lack of trust to mainstream media.
Don't be 'woke,' be 'based' by saying the quiet part out loud.
That most companies don't have marketing/lead problems, but product problems.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Codie Sanchez: They're Lying To You About How To Get Rich! How To Turn $1,000 Into $1M! Hard Work Doesn't Build Wealth!
